rows.label: tev016301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Under normal circumstances, I'd post
a request at Quest Board—but I don't
want this one to be public.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lara is a good judge of character, so I asked
him to look for someone reliable and
tight-lipped, buuut... Yeah. What about you?[ST:wait ]
